title: Kahootino Questions File
description: Schema for the quiz data file. Represents a quiz with metadata and an ordered array of questions.

$schema.description: Optional in-file $schema pointer so editors can reference the schema.

title.description: Human-readable title of the quiz (displayed to hosts/presentation).

intro_images.description: Optional array of image file paths or URLs to display during the introductory phase before players join (shown in presentation mode).

questions.description: Ordered list of questions in the quiz. The host advances through these sequentially.

text.description: Main question text shown to players and presentation.
examples: Where have Anna and Tom met?

images.description: Optional array of image file paths or URLs associated with the question (shown in presentation mode).

showImagesToPlayers.description: Whether the images should also be visible to players on their devices.

answers.description: Array of possible answer strings presented to players. Order matters for indexing.

answer_images.description: Optional array of image file paths or URLs used to illustrate answers (one or more items, shown in presentation mode).

correctIndex.description: Zero-based index into the answers array indicating the correct option. MUST satisfy 0 <= correctIndex < answers.length.

countdownSeconds.description: Number of seconds players have to submit an answer after answers are shown (countdown timer).

maxPoints.description: Maximum points available for a fastest/correct answer for this question (scoring may degrade with time).
